split.F1b: sufficiency-curve integration via imports/ boundary only

E201_F1.hyperparameters_frozen_at: harness.py @ 26ccd27 (sub=1.0, indel=1.0, max_len_delta=2, iters=25, freq-init EM, SOFT anchors)
E201_F1.qualification_rung: R_full = 10 fit-anchors + 10% fit-bilingual; single rung, no search
syllabic_qualification: LB or Cypriot >= threshold at R_full on holdout

abstention.confidence: frac chars with top1-top2 count margin >= 2

E201_F1.effect_size: acc-chance with 1000-bootstrap 95% CI; qualification needs CI lower > 2x chance
E201_F1.missing_cells: fail closed; one logged rerun allowed for pure infrastructure failure

false_graduation_calibration.escalation: if >=1 failure continue to N=400; bound>0.02 -> arm FAILS

CP-SAT soft penalties, weight bands {0.25,0.5,1,2,4}x grade base

counting bounds + CP-SAT/Z3 backbone cross-check + synthetic validation
